violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils bone saw, and meat grinder were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per interview with staff, bone saw is only sanitized at end of day. Bone saw and grinder must be sanitized every four hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
